Package com.salesforce.multicloudj.iam.model

Class ComputeActions

java.lang.Object
com.salesforce.multicloudj.iam.model.ComputeActions
public final class ComputeActions extends Object
Pre-defined compute service actions for IAM policies.

These constants represent common compute operations that can be used in policy statements across AWS EC2, GCP Compute Engine, and other cloud providers.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Action
    ALL
    Wildcard action representing all compute operations
    static final Action
    CREATE_INSTANCE
    Action to create/launch a new compute instance
    static final Action
    DELETE_INSTANCE
    Action to delete/terminate a compute instance
    static final Action
    DESCRIBE_INSTANCES
    Action to list/describe compute instances
    static final Action
    GET_INSTANCE
    Action to get details of a specific compute instance
    static final Action
    START_INSTANCE
    Action to start a stopped compute instance
    static final Action
    STOP_INSTANCE
    Action to stop a running compute instance
